metadata.name: Track an Overseas Vessel with Parts

description: A logistics manager needs to track an ocean freighter carrying a large shipment of transmissions from a supplier in Germany.

nodes.task_description: Get the container number or bill of lading for the shipment.
Use an international freight tracking system to find the vessel's name and current location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the shipment is on the 'MSC Isabella' and its current location is in the mid-Atlantic.

nodes.task_description: Provide the manager with the vessel's estimated date of arrival at the port.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the manager the ETA for port arrival.
